global.description: The ad features a bold red background with food images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Quick meal options with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A vibrant red background fills the canvas, providing a bold and eye-catching base for the ad.

elements.label: Food images
elements.description: Two stylized food images are displayed prominently in the center, suggesting quick meal options.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo 'CraveLoop' appears at the top in a modern font, conveying brand identity.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: The text 'Dinner in minutes' is bold and large, positioned centrally to attract attention.

elements.label: Free delivery offer
elements.description: The text 'Free delivery over $15' is smaller and placed below the main headline, providing additional information.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent 'Book now' button is displayed in a contrasting color, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small 'SALE' badge is positioned at the top right, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A circular decorative element is present near the food images, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional icon
elements.description: A small icon is located near the food images, possibly representing a feature or service.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: An additional element is present at the bottom, possibly indicating further details or features.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: The text 'Dinner in minutes Free Book now' is prominently displayed at the bottom, summarizing the offer.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Fre Book now

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The 'CraveLoop' logo appears at the top, reinforcing brand recognition.

elements.label: SALE text
elements.description: The word 'SALE' is displayed in a bold font at the top right, highlighting a special offer.
